lines.english: Leaving behind their property, youth and wealth, they march off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਜਕਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੈ ਬਾਣੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dojak paae sirajanahaarai lekhaa mangai baaneea |2|
lines.english: They are consigned to hell by the Creator Lord, and the Accountant calls them to give their account. ||2||
No brothers or sisters can go with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਰੀਮ ਨ ਜਾਤੋ ਕਰਤਾ ਤਿਲ ਪੀੜੇ ਜਿਉ ਘਾਣੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karan kareem na jaato karataa til peerre jiau ghaaneea |3|
lines.english: They do not know the kind and compassionate Lord; they shall be crushed like sesame seeds in the oil-press. ||3||
You happily, cheerfully steal the possessions of others,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਲਬਿ ਪਇਆ ਖਾਤ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਅਗਲੀ ਗਲ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: duneea lab peaa khaat andar agalee gal na jaaneea |4|
lines.english: Through worldly greed, you have fallen into the pit; you know nothing of the future. ||4||
but the Lord God is with you, watching and listening.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ਅੰਧਾ ਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਹੈ ਪਰਾਣੀਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jin keetaa tisai na jaanee andhaa taa dukh sahai paraaneea |5|
lines.english: The mortal does not know the One who created him; he is blind, and so he shall suffer. ||5||
You shall suffer terrible punishment, on your way to the land beyond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਿ ਜਮਿ ਮਰੈ ਮਰੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ॥
lines.translit: jam jam marai marai fir jamai |
lines.english: You shall be born and born again, and die and die again, only to be reincarnated again.
The drama of the world is bad; it brings sadness and then happiness.
Forgetting the Creator Lord, he is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਦਕੁ ਸਬੂਰੀ ਸੰਤੁ ਨ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਵਤੈ ਆਪਣ ਭਾਣੀਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sidak sabooree sant na milio vatai aapan bhaaneea |6|
lines.english: One who does not meet the Saint does not have faith or contentment; he wanders just as he pleases. ||6||
The Lord Himself stages all this drama.
Some, he lifts up, and some he throws into the waves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਨਚਾਏ ਤਿਉ ਤਿਉ ਨਚਨਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਿਰਤ ਵਿਹਾਣੀਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jiau nachaae tiau tiau nachan sir sir kirat vihaaneea |7|
lines.english: As He makes them dance, so do they dance. Everyone lives their lives according to their past actions. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਣ ਗੀਤਾ ਨਿਤ ਵਖਾਣੀਆ ॥੮॥੨॥੮॥੧੨॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: amrit naam daan naanak kau gun geetaa nit vakhaaneea |8|2|8|12|20|
lines.english: Please bless Nanak with the gift of the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord; he continually sings the songs of Your Glories. ||8||2||8||12||20||
In the Society of the Saints, one is not consigned to hell.
When the Lord and Master grants His Grace, then we meditate on Him.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maaroo, Solahas, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਜੀ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਫੁਨਿ ਗੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin sirajee tin hee fun goee |
lines.english: He who created, shall in the end destroy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa sach soee avar na koee |
lines.english: The True Lord is True; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਰਹਣਾ ਤੁਮ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਮੁਕਰਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakhahu rahanaa tum siau kiaa mukaraaee he |1|
lines.english: As it pleases You, so You keep me, and so I remain; what excuse could I offer to You? ||1||
You yourself link each and every person to their tasks.
You Yourself create, and You Yourself destroy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਗੁਣਕਾਰੀ ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape veechaaree gunakaaree aape maarag laaee he |2|
lines.english: You contemplate Yourself, You Yourself make us worthy; You Yourself place us on the Path. ||2||
You Yourself are all-wise, You Yourself are all-knowing.
You Yourself created the Universe, and You are pleased.
You Yourself are the moon, the sun, the most perfect of the perfect.
You Yourself are spiritual wisdom, meditation, and the Guru, the Warrior Hero.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape paun paanee baisantar aape mel milaaee he |3|
lines.english: You Yourself are the air, water and fire; You Yourself unite in Union. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਜਾਲੁ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kaal jaal jam johi na saakai saache siau liv laaee he |4|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death, and his noose of death, cannot touch one, who is lovingly focused on You, O True Lord. ||4||
You Yourself are the male, and You Yourself are the female.
You Yourself are the chess-board, and You Yourself are the chessman.
You Yourself are the bumble bee, the flower, the fruit and the tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਿੜ ਬਾਧੀ ਜਗੁ ਖੇਲੈ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape pirr baadhee jag khelai aape keemat paaee he |5|
lines.english: You Yourself staged the drama in the arena of the world, and You Yourself evaluate the players. ||5||
You Yourself are the water, the desert, the ocean and the pool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਛੁ ਕਛੁ ਕਰਣੀਕਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਲਖਣਾ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aape machh kachh karaneekar teraa roop na lakhanaa jaaee he |6|
lines.english: You Yourself are the great fish, the tortoise, the Cause of causes; Your form cannot be known. ||6||
You Yourself are the day, and You Yourself are the night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਅਨਾਹਦਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad anaahad anadin ghatt ghatt sabad rajaaee he |7|
lines.english: From the very beginning, and throughout the ages, the unstruck sound current resounds, night and day; in each and every heart, the Word of the Shabad, echoes Your Will. ||7||
You Yourself are pleased by the Word of the Guru's Bani.
You Yourself are the jewel, incomparably beautiful and priceless.
You Yourself are the Assessor, the Perfect Weigher.
